revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-2-265

Alternative term: Steel plate

Rolled metal (steel) with a surface area large in comparison with its thickness.


Note: The term sheet indicates a lesser thickness than plate.

{{IALAFooter}}
